title: Packaging Corp. (PKG) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's What You Should Know

title: Packaging Corporation of America Schedules Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter 2022 Operating Results
text: LAKE FOREST, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) will hold a conference call on Tuesday, April 26, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss first quarter 2022 results. First quarter earnings results will be released after the market closes on Monday, April 25, 2022. To access the conference call, please dial (877) 370-2526 (U.S. and Canada) or (720) 634-2764 (International) by 8:45 a.m. (Eastern Time). The conference call leader will be Mark Kowlzan, and the conference ID is 2881874. A replay of the call will also be available from 12:00 p.m. (Eastern Time) on April 26, 2022 until 11:59 p.m. (Eastern Time) on May 10, 2022. To access the recording, please dial (855) 859-2056 (U.S. and Canada) or (404) 537-3406 (International). The passcode is 2881874. This call will also be webcast and accessible at PCA’s website at www.packagingcorp.com. PCA is the third largest producer of containerboard products and a leading producer of uncoated freesheet paper in North America. PCA operates eight paper mills and 90 corrugated products plants and related facilities.
